provenance.id_mapping_note: The two dry-run note files use DIFFERENT L-numberings (r1 stratification order vs the later fable-r3 file order); the prose L-numbers are NOT interchangeable. Every ID below is anchored to a FULL lesson_id citation in dryrun-notes-opus-r1.md's per-lesson sections (which cite full IDs inline), then verified present in artifacts/corpus.jsonl, never inferred from an L-number alone.
provenance.class_coverage_note: Required floors per B1 spec: heritage-ban >= 2, table-marker >= 2, r4-conflict >= 2. Each met. IDs are unique across classes; a lesson that exhibits more than one class (e.g. the Cajun twins are BOTH heritage-suspect AND R4-misaligned) is assigned a single primary class so it appears exactly once.

adversarial.title: Lotion & Agar Soap - MS
adversarial.reason: Cosmetics lesson v3-tagged cooking/basic-prep with soap ingredients as mainIngredients; body says the product is NOT for eating. Should be craft. (oq6 §3.1, the cleanest cosmetics→craft case.)

adversarial.title: Lotion & Agar Soap - K
adversarial.reason: K-variant sibling of the MS cosmetics lesson with the same cooking-tag shape; same-titled pair tests both cosmetics→craft AND cross-variant consistency. (oq6 §3.1.)

adversarial.title: Dr. Carver Lotion-Making
adversarial.reason: Craft+food hybrid (lotion-making PLUS Hoppin' John burgers eaten) flattened to cooking-only; the headline craft activity has no representation. Judgment case, not rule-following. (oq6 §3.2.)

adversarial.title: Farm Workers & Pesticides
adversarial.reason: Garden/social-justice lesson whose only food contact is a closing 'seasonal tasting'; PROD carries [cooking,garden] with empty cooking fields — internally contradictory. One of the 3 documented both→garden fixes. (oq6 §3.3.)

adversarial.title: Roots
adversarial.reason: Garden lesson that finishes with 'a tasting, ideally of an edible root'; same both→garden tasting-conflation as Farm Workers. (oq6 §3.3.)

adversarial.title: Plant Families
adversarial.reason: Garden lesson with a closing tasting; the third documented both→garden tasting-conflation case (the calibration-strong one per oq6 §3.8). Tests the rule does NOT over-fire on genuine garden lessons. (oq6 §3.3/§3.8.)

adversarial.title: Seed Dispersal
adversarial.reason: One of three same-titled 'Seed Dispersal' rows v3 classified inconsistently (different seasons/themes/activity_type across identical-family lessons). This variant is garden-only. (oq6 §3.4.)

adversarial.title: Seed Dispersal
adversarial.reason: The 7-8 'Seed Dispersal' variant v3 tagged cookingSkills:['Tasting'] (off-vocab) → became a [cooking,garden] row, where the only food is toasted-sunflower-seed tasting. Same-titled family + tasting=cooking. (oq6 §3.4.)

adversarial.title: 3 Sisters Tacos
adversarial.reason: v3 fabricated all 11 grades (3K-8) at confidence 95 for a knife-and-burner lesson whose body declares NO grades. The canonical grade-fabrication case; under source-doc-claim policy the grades row should be empty. (oq6 §3.5.)

adversarial.title: Pupusas & Curtido
adversarial.reason: Counter-case to 3 Sisters Tacos: header literally reads '3K-8th Grade', so the wide span is FAITHFUL to source. Tests the grade policy distinguishes fabricated spans from source-claimed ones. (oq6 §3.6.)

adversarial.title: Planting in Patterns
adversarial.reason: PROD survivor of five same-titled 'Planting in Patterns' rows v3 tagged with materially different format/SEL/coreComp; carries the minority 'Single period' format judgment. Tests cross-variant consistency. (oq6 §3.7.)

adversarial.title: Kitchen Tool Identification Game
adversarial.reason: Matching game whose only food is 'Enjoy a tasting!' with teacher-washed fruit; dry-run model still tagged [cooking,academic] + basic-prep (tasting≠cooking violated). Correct answer is likely [academic] alone. (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L1.)

adversarial.title: Plant Part Olympics
adversarial.reason: The only food is a 'Plant Part Smoothie' tasting list (no prep step); dry-run model tagged [cooking,academic]+basic-prep AND missed garden. Tasting=cooking + missed-garden. (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L8.)

adversarial.title: Chana Chawal and Raita
adversarial.reason: Heritage ancestor pile-on: body explicitly Pakistani, but the dry-run added South Asian + Asian ancestors the body never works at. Heritage-ban / over-broadening class. (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L6.)

adversarial.title: Food Workers' Rights
adversarial.reason: Labor-rights lesson where the dry-run inferred African American (from a Bed-Stuy address + BLM bandana) + Mexican (churros passing mention) heritages — pure demographic inference, no heritage taught. The worst heritage-ban failure (the 'L14' class). (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L14.)

adversarial.title: Cajun Black Eyed Peas Sliders (3rd-5th)
adversarial.reason: R4 conflict: Math + Arts carry academic_concepts while ABSENT from academic_integration (internal misalignment). Also a heritage edge (West African beyond the body's 'Africa') and twin-of the 6th-8th row. Primary class R4. (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L2.)

adversarial.title: Cajun Black Eyed Peas Sliders (6th-8th)
adversarial.reason: R4 conflict: academic_integration [Social Studies,Health,Literacy/ELA] while concepts carry Math/Science/Arts — the worst concepts⇄integration misalignment of the run; reconcile-direction adjudication case. Twin of the 3rd-5th row. (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L3.)

adversarial.title: Worms K-1
adversarial.reason: [Table]-marker extracted body; a later dry-run round fabricated season [Spring] on this year-round worm-bin lesson. Table-extraction-noise robustness + season fabrication. (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L10; dryrun-notes.md season-regression note.)

adversarial.title: Sensory Scavenger Hunt and Orientation
adversarial.reason: [Table]/pipe-marker extracted body; tests the model reads table cells as content (orientation tag + Beginning-of-year observance both depend on cells). (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L9.)

adversarial.title: Wild Soda
adversarial.reason: [Table]-marker extracted body; cooking+garden hybrid with heritage values traceable to the body's own tag row. Tests table-extraction robustness on a multi-axis lesson + grade restraint ('age this down' but no stated grades → []). (dryrun-notes-opus-r1 §L13.)
